hooks.command: cd C:\Users\Admin\basketball-gm && git add . && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "Update game" && git push

powershell -Command "$port = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $port) { Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -Command Set-Location C:\\Users\\Admin\\basketball-gm; npm run dev' -WindowStyle Hidden }"
